text.title: text-to-speech Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for text-to-speech as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Cloning voices without explicit written consent from the voice owner.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Voice cloning without consent violates GDPR Article 9 (biometric data), CCPA biometric provisions, and most major platform terms of service. ElevenLabs and other providers require voice owner consent verification. Always obtain and store written consent with timestamp before cloning any voice for production use.
